name: Ravioli Bake
recipeIngredient: 15 ounces beef ravioli in tomato and meat sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the beef ravioli, mushrooms, onions, cheese, Italian seasoning, and salt.
2. Mix well until all ingredients are evenly distributed.
3. Spread the mixture in a 1-quart casserole dish.
4. Sprinkle croutons over the top of the casserole dish.
5. Cover loosely with microwave-safe covering.
6. Microwave on high for 5 minutes, or until the ravioli mixture is hot throughout.
